_comment: Keyword tooltip strings. Drafted from principles §2; review alongside C2 card text. One sentence each, player-facing.
_mechanism: NOT the Downfall card_keywords.json pattern -- that was an assumption and it is wrong for StS2 (see DECISIONS finding 20). This file is a text staging area, not something the game reads. Real path: declare `public static CardKeyword Foo;` fields carrying [CustomEnum] + [KeywordProperties] on a holder class; BaseLib assigns IDs at ModelDb.Init and registers them in CustomKeywords.KeywordIDs. Strings then go in the `card_keywords` loc table under `<PREFIX>FOO.title` / `<PREFIX>FOO.description`, where PREFIX is BaseLib's mod prefix (KLEEMOD-). Use AutoKeywordPosition.None for these -- Before/After append the keyword to EVERY card's text globally, which is right for Exhaust and wrong for Bomb.
aura: An element clinging to an enemy for 2 turns; hitting it with a different element consumes it and triggers a Reaction.
pyro: Fire. All of Klee's attacks apply Pyro.
hydro: Water. Leaves a Hydro aura on the enemy.
electro: Lightning. Leaves an Electro aura on the enemy.
cryo: Ice. Leaves a Cryo aura on the enemy.
anemo: Wind. Leaves no aura — it triggers Swirl on contact instead.
geo: Stone. Leaves no aura — it triggers Crystallize on contact instead.
vaporize: Pyro meets Hydro: that hit deals x1.5 damage.
melt: Pyro meets Cryo: that hit deals x1.75 damage.
overload: Pyro meets Electro: the hit splashes bonus damage to ALL enemies.
superconduct: Electro meets Cryo: the enemy becomes Vulnerable.
electro_charged: Hydro meets Electro: the enemy takes a stacking damage-over-time.
frozen: Hydro meets Cryo: the enemy's next action deals half damage, and the first attack to hit it Shatters; bosses become Vulnerable 2 instead.
shatter: Hitting a Frozen enemy: bonus damage, and the Frozen state is removed.
swirl: Anemo trigger: copies the target's aura onto all enemies.
bomb: A charge placed on an enemy: it explodes at the start of YOUR turn, and unblocked Attack damage can set it off early. The first attack that enemy makes while Bombed each combat deals 25% less damage. Bombs stack, and each keeps its own damage.
spark: Klee's counter: at 3 Sparks, her next Attack costs 0 and the Sparks are spent.
burst: Fills from Skill-tagged cards and Reactions; when full, your signature Burst card becomes playable and casting it empties the meter.
retain: This card stays in your hand at end of turn.
encore: (Reserved — future companion mechanic; do not ship a tooltip yet.)
